title: CLOCK_PONG Message Schema
description: Schema for CLOCK_PONG message sent by server in response to CLOCK_PING. Client calculates offset and RTT from these timestamps.

clientSendTime.description: Client timestamp when ping was sent (from CLOCK_PING)

serverRecvTime.description: Server timestamp when ping was received (epoch ms)

serverSendTime.description: Server timestamp when pong is being sent (epoch ms)

clientRecvTime.description: Client timestamp when pong is received (epoch ms, filled in by client)
